headline: Gilead Sciences (GILD) Wins Trodelvy Approvals And Expands Texas CAR T Access
summary: Gilead Sciences (NasdaqGS:GILD) received FDA approval for Trodelvy in first line treatment of advanced triple negative breast cancer. European regulators also approved Trodelvy in the same setting for eligible patients. The company entered a partnership with BBG Advanced Therapies to deploy a mobile center offering Kite CAR T cell therapies across Texas. These updates place oncology and cell therapy firmly at the center of Gilead Sciences' story, alongside its established presence in...

headline: Gilead Sciences (GILD) After Russell Growth Index Removal And A Fully Valued Narrative
summary: Gilead Sciences (GILD) has just been removed from several Russell growth oriented indexes. This is a technical shift that can affect how some funds hold the stock and how investors view its role in portfolios. See our latest analysis for Gilead Sciences. Recent news around index removals and drug approvals has come alongside a 7.82% 7 day share price return and an 11.69% year to date share price gain for Gilead Sciences. Its 1 year total shareholder return of 23.06% and 5 year total...

headline: Is Gilead Sciences (GILD) Cheap With Trodelvy And Yeztugo In Focus?
summary: Gilead Sciences stock has delivered a strong 5 year run, yet current valuation checks paint a more mixed picture. The overall score sits between clearly cheap and clearly expensive, while recent oncology and HIV news keeps expectations elevated. Over the past 5 years, Gilead Sciences has returned about 140.0%, which puts more pressure on today’s valuation to be backed by durable cash flows rather than just sentiment. Regulatory approvals and positive momentum for Trodelvy and Yeztugo can...
